metadata.description: Test Agent Academy labs end-to-end via Playwright. Walks through each lab step in a live browser and files issues at microsoft/agent-academy.

plugins.name: agent-academy-tester
plugins.description: Test Copilot Studio Agent Academy labs end-to-end via Playwright. Opens Edge with your browser profile, walks through lab steps, judges each against the live UI, and files GitHub issues for broken or unclear instructions.
